requirement_topic.en: INACOM Homologação — Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: INACOM设备认证（homologação）——无线电/电信终端设备型式认可
requirement_topic.zht: INACOM設備認證（homologação）——無線電/電信終端設備型式認可

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment sold or used in Angola must obtain INACOM mandatory homologação (type approval) under Lei 23/11 (Electronic Communications Law). Applications require a technical file and ILAC-accredited laboratory test reports. CE, FCC, and CCC approvals are not recognised by INACOM and do not substitute for homologação. Portuguese-language documentation is required throughout the process.
summary.zh: 在安哥拉销售或使用的所有无线电和电信终端设备必须依据第23/11号法律（电子通信法）取得INACOM强制设备认证（homologação）。申请须提交技术文件及ILAC认可实验室的测试报告。INACOM不承认CE、FCC和CCC批准，此类批准不能替代homologação要求。全程须提供葡萄牙语文件。
summary.zht: 在安哥拉銷售或使用的所有無線電和電信終端設備必須依據第23/11號法律（電子通訊法）取得INACOM強制設備認證（homologação）。申請須提交技術文件及ILAC認可實驗室的測試報告。INACOM不承認CE、FCC和CCC批准，此類批准不能替代homologação要求。全程須提供葡萄牙語文件。

standards_or_laws: Lei 23/11 — Lei das Comunicações Electrónicas (Electronic Communications Law of Angola)

summary.en: China requires MIIT/SRRC radio type approval (CMIIT ID) for wireless transmitters and a MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for telecommunications terminal equipment. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) may apply for RF components in scope. GB radio and EMC standards (e.g. GB 9254, GB/T 22450 series) form the technical baseline. These are China-domestic approvals only.
summary.zh: 中国对无线电发射设备要求工信部/SRRC无线电型式核准（CMIIT ID），对电信终端设备要求工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）可能适用于范围内的射频元器件。GB无线电和EMC标准（如GB 9254、GB/T 22450系列）构成技术基准。上述批准均为中国境内有效，不具域外效力。
summary.zht: 中國對無線電發射設備要求工信部/SRRC無線電型式核准（CMIIT ID），對電信終端設備要求工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）可能適用於範圍內的射頻元器件。GB無線電和EMC標準（如GB 9254、GB/T 22450系列）構成技術基準。上述批准均為中國境內有效，不具域外效力。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (CMIIT ID)

gap.en: INACOM homologação is an independent Angola-specific process; SRRC, CMIIT, CE, FCC, and CCC marks are not accepted by INACOM. A technical file with ILAC-accredited test reports must be submitted in Portuguese. Devices without valid INACOM homologação cannot legally be sold or used in Angola.
gap.zh: INACOM设备认证是独立的安哥拉专项流程；INACOM不接受SRRC、CMIIT、CE、FCC及CCC标志。须以葡萄牙语提交含ILAC认可实验室测试报告的技术文件。未取得有效INACOM设备认证的设备不得在安哥拉合法销售或使用。
gap.zht: INACOM設備認證是獨立的安哥拉專項流程；INACOM不接受SRRC、CMIIT、CE、FCC及CCC標誌。須以葡萄牙語提交含ILAC認可實驗室測試報告的技術文件。未取得有效INACOM設備認證的設備不得在安哥拉合法銷售或使用。

source.publisher: INACOM — Instituto Nacional das Comunicações de Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC, CMIIT, CE, FCC, and CCC approvals do not satisfy INACOM homologação requirements. A separate INACOM application supported by ILAC-accredited test reports and Portuguese-language documentation is required before sale or use in Angola.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC、CMIIT、CE、FCC和CCC批准均不满足INACOM设备认证（homologação）要求。须另行提交INACOM申请，并附ILAC认可实验室测试报告及葡萄牙语文件，方可在安哥拉销售或使用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC、CMIIT、CE、FCC和CCC批准均不滿足INACOM設備認證（homologação）要求。須另行提交INACOM申請，並附ILAC認可實驗室測試報告及葡萄牙語文件，方可在安哥拉銷售或使用。
